name: active_users_signup_survey_email
subject: GovWifi sign up survey
body:
Thank you for signing up to GovWifi. 

We’d like to know how you found the experience. Please complete our survey https://surveys.publishing.service.gov.uk/s/86YDMX/ which should take 5 minutes to complete. 

We'll use your feedback to improve the service.

name: active_users_signup_survey_sms
body:
Thank you for signing up to GovWifi

Please tell us about your experience in our 5 minute survey https://surveys.publishing.service.gov.uk/s/86YDMX
